tiles.name: Tombs of Amascut
tiles.description:
Gain 10 points in total with this as a guide:
- 10 pts: Any Purple drop (Instant Clear)
- 1 pt per player: Deathless 350+ completion
- 1 bonus pt: If with at least 4 of your team
- Mandatory: Screenshot of Raid Summary showing 0 deaths and 350+ Invo

tiles.name: Chambers of Xeric
tiles.description:
Gain 40 points in total with this as a guide:
- 40 pts: Any Purple drop (Instant Clear)
- 20 pts: CoX completion with 7+ team members
- 10 pts: CoX completion with 3 to 6 team members
- 2 pts: CoX completion with 1 to 2 team members
- Two smaller teams (3–6 or 1–2 members) may not run CoX at the same time
- Mandatory: Screenshot of the final chest/chatbox showing all team members and completion time

tiles.name: Theatre of Blood
tiles.description:
Gain 30 points in total with this as a guide:
- 30 pts: Any Purple drop (Instant Clear)
- 2 pts: Base ToB completion
- 3 pts: Per UNIQUE team member that completes a raid (tracked across all submissions)
- Mandatory: Screenshot of the MVP board/chest room showing all participating members
